This is an ivy signatured, no brokerage, newly renovated home with a buyback guarantee.An east-Facing 3bhk on the 4th floor, this 1,600 sq ft semi-Furnished unit is one of the more distinctive configurations in the project. Three bedrooms, three bathrooms, two balconies  and crucially, two master bedrooms. That is a feature that genuinely changes how a home functions, whether for a family with elderly parents, working couples who each need their own space, or simply anyone who refuses to settle for one good bedroom and one that isn't. The east-Facing entrance brings morning light into the home from the start of the day, while the balcony faces west  catching the sunset every evening in a way that makes that outdoor space worth actually using. 
Myhna maple is a well-Conceived gated community spread across 5.5 acres off sh 35, at the marathahallisarjapur road junction in devasthanagalu, whitefield. With 416 units across its blocks, the society is large enough to support a full amenity set  clubhouse, swimming pool, landscaped open spaces, and sports facilities  while remaining compact enough to feel like a community rather than a township. The common areas are well maintained, and the society attracts the kind of long-Term residents who take genuine ownership of where they live.
The location at devasthanagalu sits at the confluence of east bengaluru's three most active corridors  marathahalli, whitefield, and sarjapur road  putting the city's densest concentration of tech parks, schools, hospitals, and retail within a single commute direction. For families and working professionals alike, few addresses in this part of the city offer comparable reach.

Additional modern amenities available within the project enhance the overall living experience, catering to the needs of contemporary urban lifestyles.
Locality

Wake up to the sunrise streaming directly into your bedrooms and balcony  this west-Facing 2-Bedroom, 2-Bathroom ground floor apartment at suncity gloria is a home that starts every morning on a bright and beautiful note. Spanning a comfortable 1,219 sq ft, the semi-Furnished unit is currently vacant. One open parking spot is included, with a maintenance charge of 3.70 per sq ft per month.
Ground floor living at its most practical  no lifts, no waiting, direct access in and out  making this an excellent choice for families with young children, elderly residents, or anyone who values ease of movement and a direct connect to the outdoors.

With an impressive 75% open space, the society is defined by its lush green landscapes, wide open areas, and a breathing room that is rare in today's urban developments. A large, vibrant, and well-Maintained community that offers residents both the energy of a connected neighbourhood and the calm of a green retreat.

description:
This is an ivy-Certified, fully legally verified apartment.Welcome to unicca emporis  an extraordinarily spacious and luxuriously appointed 2bhk apartment that redefines what premium residential living truly means in bengaluru. With a private jacuzzi, a master bedroom with a walk-In closet, sweeping high-Floor views, and a jaw-Dropping 1,755 sqft of living space  this is not just a home, it is a personal five-Star retreat that you get to come back to every single day.
Luxury that lives up to every expectation perched grandly on the 15th of 16 floors  one of the highest vantage points in the entire building  this stunning east-Facing, semi-Furnished apartment offers a living experience that is genuinely in a class of its own. At 1,755 sqft, this is one of the most generously proportioned 2bhk apartments available anywhere on the varthur-Sarjapur corridor, offering room to live, breathe, entertain, and simply exist in the kind of spacious comfort that most apartments can only aspire to. The east-Facing orientation ensures glorious morning light streams into every corner of the home, with breathtaking sunrise views from your private balcony that make waking up here an experience worth looking forward to every single morning.
What truly elevates jal-1504 above every other 2bhk in the market are the bespoke features that make daily life here feel genuinely extraordinary. The master bedroom with a dedicated walk-In closet is a rare luxury in apartment living  a private dressing space that brings boutique hotel elegance into your everyday routine, keeping your bedroom serene, clutter-Free, and beautifully organised at all times. 
 Nearly 7 years young and maintained to an exceptional standard, what you see is precisely what you get  a premium, move-In-Ready home with no hidden surprises and no renovation required. 
A location at the heart of bengaluru's tech goldmine situated at madhura nagar, sorahunase main road, varthur  this address places you at the epicentre of one of bengaluru's most dynamic and high-Value real estate corridors. Varthur sits at the crossroads of the whitefield it belt and the sarjapur road tech corridor  two of the city's most powerful employment and commercial engines  giving residents of this address unparalleled access to the biggest names in india's technology industry. Itpl, whitefield's tech parks, rga tech park, and sarjapur road's booming commercial strip are all within comfortable commuting distance, making this home an absolute dream address for senior it professionals, entrepreneurs, and executives who demand the best from their location as much as from their home. Reputed international schools, premium hospitals, upscale dining destinations, and world-Class retail experiences are all easily accessible, ensuring that every aspect of your lifestyle is catered to with the quality and convenience this home deserves.
Life at unicca emporis  exclusive, elegant & exceptional. Unicca emporis is a boutique premium gated community spread across 3.12 acres, home to just 214 families, and that exclusivity is central to everything that makes this community exceptional. 
The amenity offering at unicca emporis is curated for a discerning resident who expects the best. Beautifully landscaped green spaces provide a calming, resort-Like atmosphere within the campus. A premium clubhouse serves as the social and recreational heart of the community. A well-Equipped gymnasium, swimming pool, children's play areas, and dedicated recreational spaces complete an amenity package that ensures residents never need to look beyond their own gates for leisure and wellness. The small, close-Knit community of 214 families means maintenance is meticulous, response times are fast, and the overall quality of the living environment is maintained to a standard that reflects the premium nature of the development. With 24/7 security, cctv surveillance, and strictly controlled access, privacy and safety are absolute  befitting a community where residents have chosen to invest in the very best.

Bathed in the warmth of the morning sun, this east-Facing 2-Bedroom, 2-Bathroom apartment on the 2nd floor of a grand 28-Floor tower is a home that greets every day with light, energy, and calm. With a generous built-Up area of 1,216 sq ft, one balcony, and two covered parking spots, the unit is thoughtfully designed for comfortable, everyday living.Strategically located in varthur hobli, gunjur village, along the marathahallisarjapur road corridor in whitefield, the apartment enjoys seamless connectivity to bengaluru's major it hubs, retail destinations, and arterial roads with direct access via varthur main road making daily commutes effortless. For investors, the location and society pedigree together promise strong rental returns, making this an equally attractive buy-To-Let opportunity.Spanning an expansive 99 acres with the vision of a township that breathes more nature and less concrete prestige lakeside habitat is one of bengaluru's largest and most celebrated integrated townships. With a staggering 3,699 units spread across multiple towers, this is a community built to cater to every stage of life, every lifestyle, and every aspiration.
 Lush landscaped gardens, wide tree-Lined pathways, a sparkling lakeside setting, and world-Class amenities come together to create an environment that is as rejuvenating as it is vibrant. From wellness facilities and sports courts to retail conveniences and community spaces, everything you need is right within the gates.
Whether you're a young professional, a growing family, or a discerning investor, prestige lakeside habitat offers not just a home but a way of life that is thoughtfully crafted, beautifully maintained, and built to last.

description:
This is an ivy signatured, no brokerage, newly renovated home with a buyback guarantee.
There is a particular kind of apartment that does not announce itself loudly but reveals its quality the longer you spend in it. This unit in ideal carnation is that kind of home. A south-Facing 2bhk on the 1st floor, it spans 1,260 sq ft of semi-Furnished space with two bedrooms, two bathrooms, and two balconies  one attached to each bedroom. That last detail matters more than it first appears. A bedroom with its own balcony is a different experience altogether  more light, better ventilation, and a private outdoor moment that a shared living room balcony simply cannot replicate.
A fully renovated, which means the next owner inherits not a tired decade-Old flat but a blank slate within a proven structure.
Ideal carnation itself is a mature, settled community on 2 acres in kothanur, with 176 units spread across its blocks. Ten years of occupancy have given it exactly what newer societies are still working toward  established greenery, a functioning residents' association, and the quiet confidence of infrastructure that has been tested and held up. It is a society that has earned its reputation through time rather than marketing.
Kothanur sits comfortably on bengaluru's northern residential belt, 500 metres from kristu jayanti university and well connected to hennur road, thanisandra main road, and the manyata employment corridor. The unit is vacant and ready to move immediately.

Assured buy back guaranteeWelcome to dsr eden greens  a magnificently fully renovated 3bhk apartment that is vacant, move-In ready, and waiting for its next proud owner to walk through the door and begin the best chapter of their life. In a market where finding a spacious, fully upgraded 3bhk in a premium east bengaluru community at a fair price feels almost impossible  this home makes it wonderfully, excitingly real.
Three balconies, three bedrooms, zero compromises. Sitting beautifully on the 4th of 10 floors, this stunning east-Facing, semi-Furnished apartment spans a generous 1,715 sqft with 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms, and an extraordinary 3 private balconies. Three balconies mean every room in this home breathes freely  fresh air, natural light, and open sky accessible from multiple corners of your living space, creating an atmosphere that feels expansive, airy, and genuinely luxurious at every hour of the day. The east-Facing orientation delivers glorious morning sunshine that fills the home with warmth and energy from the moment you wake up, making every single day here begin on the most beautiful note possible.
Brand new interiors, zero renovation costs. The full renovation of this apartment is what truly sets it apart from every other 3bhk in the market. Fresh finishes, modern fittings, upgraded surfaces, and a home that looks, feels, and functions like a brand new build  without the brand new build waiting period or price. Every corner has been thoughtfully renewed, every fitting carefully upgraded, so that the only thing you need to do is arrive with your furniture and begin living immediately. In a segment where renovation costs on a 1,715 sq ft apartment can easily run into significant lakhs, this fully upgraded home represents a genuine and measurable financial advantage for the smart buyer.
An address that east bengaluru's best call home situated on carmelaram road, carmelaram, janatha colony, doddakannelli  this address sits in one of east bengaluru's most prestigious, green, and rapidly appreciating residential neighbourhoods. Outer ring road, marathahalli, bellandur, and the broader east bengaluru tech belt are all within comfortable reach, connecting residents to some of the city's largest and most prestigious employers. Reputed international schools, premium hospitals, upscale supermarkets, and a growing dining and lifestyle scene ensure that every practical need of your family's daily life is met with the quality this address deserves.
Life at dsr eden greens  exclusive, green & beautifully managed dsr eden greens is a premium boutique gated community spread across 2 lush acres, home to just 197 families  and that exclusivity is at the very heart of what makes this community so special. 
With only 197 families sharing 2 acres, the space-To-Resident ratio is genuinely generous  there is always room to move, to relax, and to enjoy the beautifully landscaped green spaces that give the community its serene, resort-Like atmosphere. The amenity offering is well-Curated and actively maintained  a clubhouse, gymnasium, children's play areas, landscaped gardens, and recreational spaces that enrich daily life and bring the community together in meaningful, enjoyable ways. The professional management team ensures maintenance is always prompt, common areas are consistently immaculate, and the overall living standard of the community reflects the premium nature of the development. With 24/7 security and strictly controlled access, residents enjoy complete peace of mind  the quiet, reliable safety that every premium home should deliver as an absolute baseline.

description:
This is an ivy-Certified, fully legally verified apartment.Welcome to a standout 2bhk corner apartment that offers three things most bengaluru apartment hunters spend years searching for  no common walls, an east-Facing entrance, and 80% open space  all wrapped into one smartly priced package in the heart of electronic city phase i. This is not your average apartment. This is the one you tell your friends you found.
No common walls, no compromises. Perched on the 4th of 4 floors  the top floor  this east-Facing, semi-Furnished corner apartment spans 981 sqft with 2 well-Sized bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and a private balcony. No common walls means complete privacy on all sides, superior sound insulation from neighbours, enhanced cross-Ventilation, and extra natural light flooding in from multiple directions  creating a home that feels noticeably more spacious, quieter, and more private than any standard apartment at this price point. Add to this the top-Floor advantage of no footstep sounds from above, and you have a living experience that is genuinely peaceful, private, and premium in every sense.
The east-Facing entrance ensures your home is bathed in warm, energising morning light from the very first moment of every day  keeping interiors naturally bright, well-Ventilated, and wonderfully comfortable through every season of the bengaluru year.
80% open space  breathe, relax, and truly unwind. In a city where open space is increasingly precious and fiercely competed for, foyer city's 80% open space commitment is a real differentiator that sets this community apart from virtually every other society at this price level. Step outside your door and you are surrounded by greenery, open lawns, fresh air, and the kind of breathing room that transforms daily life from simply functional to genuinely restorative. For families with children, fitness enthusiasts, or anyone who simply values having space to move and exist freely outside their apartment walls, this advantage compounds in value with every passing year.
Electronic city phase i  location that needs no introduction situated at 3rd cross road, near sri lakshmi narasimha swamy temple, green house layout, doddathoguru, electronic city phase i  this address places you at the very core of one of india's most iconic technology hubs. Whether you work in electronic city's sprawling tech campuses or commute along the nice road, hosur road, or bannerghatta road corridors, this location makes your daily professional life as smooth and efficient as it can be. Reputed schools, hospitals, supermarkets, neighbourhood markets, restaurants, and daily conveniences are all within easy reach  making life here practical, comfortable, and genuinely enjoyable for working professionals and families alike.
Life at foyer city  open, green & warmly community-Minded foyer city is a thoughtfully designed gated community spread across 2 acres, home to 164 families, and the defining feature of this community is the remarkable generosity of its open spaces. With 80% of the campus dedicated to open areas, foyer city feels less like a typical apartment complex and more like a green residential retreat where the outdoors is as much a part of your home as the indoors. Beautifully maintained landscaping, open lawns, and recreational spaces create an environment that is calm, refreshing, and deeply pleasant to come home to every single day.
The intimate scale of 164 families ensures that maintenance is attentive and personal, common areas are always well-Kept, and the community atmosphere is warm, friendly, and genuinely connected  the kind of neighbourhood where residents look out for each other and life feels human-Sized and comfortable. With 24/7 security and controlled access, every resident enjoys complete peace of mind in a safe, well-Managed campus that takes the security of its families seriously.

description:
This west facing 2.5 bhk unit is part of a gated community from adarsh group. It comes with 1 large balcony, facing east towards the the open fields and trees. The bedrooms and living spaces are spacious. Quality is an epitome in these apartments and is clearly visible in every aspect of the construction.(For eg: While both washrooms are accompanied with premium bathroom fittings, lights and mirrors, the bathroom attached to the master bedroom, comes with a shower cubicle too).
It is a low density, low rise (G+4) structure, just off hennur main road (New airport road) and behind adarsh tranqville villas in north bangalore.The project is housed on 4 acres, but offers, just 201 spacious, vaastu compliant, 2, 2.5 & 3 bhk apartments, making it a low density community/ project. Further, there are a total of 10 blocks, but, 70% of open space/ landscaped gardens, a 5500 sft fully equipped clubhouse, gymnasium, a swimming pool, recreation rooms, outdoor sports courts, childrens play area, amphitheater & a party hall. These are all meticulously planned with utmost importance to state-Of-The-Art 24/7 securities, thus adding to a luxurious & exclusive living haven.
The project being located at the heart of chikkagubbi (Hennur road) is equidistant from outer ring road, manyata tech park, old madras road, bagalur, thanisandra road & other key hubs across north bangalore. Some of the top schools like dps north, ekya, legacy global, nps, chrystalis, vibgour, norbert, to name a few, are just a few minutes from this project, ensuring that children spend valuable time at school and their homes, rather than, in traffic.
Wrt recreation, there are large hyper markets, malls like mall of bangalore, pubs, shops of all kinds, decathlon etc, are just 5-7 mins from the project. 
Lastly, all delivery apps/service /transport apps, comfortably offer services in and around this project, thus ensuring that much needed ease of life too.

description:
Address : Affinity gardenia, ananthapura, bangalore north bangalore
Structure:
Walls:
R.C.C framed structure
8 cellular and 6 solid blocks for exterior walls & 4solid blocks forinternal walls.
Doors:
Teak wood door frame with designer shutter for main door & hardwood frames, architraves and veneer polish shutters for all other doors. Windows:
3 track upvc windows with clear glass and mosquito mesh with sliding track system with reputed brand. Fenesta or equivalent, flooring:
First quality 24x24" vitrified rak/nitco or equivalent tiles in living, dining & bedrooms and anti-Skid ceramic tiles in bathrooms and balconies.
Common areas:
Granite flooring for common areas like staircase, lobbies etc, kitchen:
Kitchen platform with granite top and stainless steel sink, glazed tiles dado upto 2 feet height above platform.
Toilets:
Ceramic tiles dado upto 7 feet height with standard jaquar/toto or equivalent c p fittings and jaquar/toto or equivalent sanitary fittings. Provision for geyser and exhaust fan in all bathrooms. Solar hot water provision for master bathroom.
Plastering:
Sand with cement plastering with sponge finish for external walls & birla wall putty finish for internal walls.
Painting:
Emulsion for internal walls and exterior emulsion for external walls. Electrification:
Concealed copper wiring with anchor roma/equivalent switches & sockets. T.V. And telephone points in living and bedrooms. Provision for a/c point in master bedroom.
Water supply:
24 hrs. Water supply from bore well with the overhead tank anc sump.
Lift:
Fully automatic lifts johnson/kone or equivalent power backup:
Railing:
Generator backup for common areas, lift and all flats.
Glass railing and ss railing with powder coated as per design solarpanel:
Solar panel system at terrace as per requirement.

description:
Ivy signatured, no brokerage, newly renovated home with a buyback guarantee.
A rare find in bengaluru's apartment landscape  this is a duplex apartment with a private terrace, perched on the 15th floor of a 27-Floor tower at bhartiya city nikoo homes. With two bedrooms, two bathrooms, and two balconies spread across 1,276 sq ft, this east-Facing home offers the space, elevation, and exclusivity of a penthouse-Style living experience  at a remarkably compelling price.
Step out onto your private terrace and take in sweeping open views from one of the highest floors in the tower  a luxury that very few apartments in this city can offer. The east-Facing orientation ensures glorious morning light floods the home each day, while the duplex layout creates a natural separation between living and sleeping spaces, adding a sense of grandeur to everyday life.
Semi-Furnished and currently vacant, the apartment is ready for possession.
And then there's the location  just 50 metres from bhartiya mall of bengaluru, one of the city's most vibrant retail and entertainment destinations. Located on nikoo homes road, kanakasree housing society, kannuru, bengaluru, the apartment also enjoys excellent connectivity to hebbal, thanisandra, and the northern bengaluru corridor.Bhartiya city nikoo homes is part of the landmark bhartiya city  one of bengaluru's most ambitious and celebrated integrated townships, spanning 11 acres of meticulously planned urban living. Home to 1,578 units across soaring towers, nikoo homes is a community designed for those who want it all  luxury, convenience, community, and connectivity  without compromise.
The integrated township model means residents have access to retail, dining, entertainment, and essential services all within the same ecosystem  making everyday life effortlessly convenient.
For those who want the energy of the city paired with the comfort of a well-Designed home  and a private terrace to retreat to at the end of the day  bhartiya city nikoo homes is an address like no other.

description:
Address : Affinity gardenia, ananthapura, bangalore north bangalore
Structure:
Walls:
R.C.C framed structure
8 cellular and 6 solid blocks for exterior walls & 4solid blocks forinternal walls.

First quality 24x24" vitrified rak/nitco or equivalent tiles in living, dining & bedrooms and anti-Skid ceramic tiles in bathrooms and balconies.
Common areas:
Granite flooring for common areas like staircase, lobbies etc, kitchen:
Kitchen platform with granite top and stainless steel sink, glazed tiles dado upto 2 feet height above platform.
Toilets:
Ceramic tiles dado upto 7 feet height with standard jaquar/toto or equivalent c p fittings and jaquar/toto or equivalent sanitary fittings. Provision for geyser and exhaust fan in all bathrooms. Solar hot water provision for master bathroom.
Plastering:
Sand with cement plastering with sponge finish for external walls & birla wall putty finish for internal walls.
Painting:
Emulsion for internal walls and exterior emulsion for external walls. Electrification:
Concealed copper wiring with anchor roma/equivalent switches & sockets. T.V. And telephone points in living and bedrooms. Provision for a/c point in master bedroom.
Water supply:
24 hrs. Water supply from bore well with the overhead tank anc sump.
Lift:
Fully automatic lifts johnson/kone or equivalent power backup:
Railing:
Generator backup for common areas, lift and all flats.
Glass railing and ss railing with powder coated as per design solarpanel:
Solar panel system at terrace as per requirement.
